subcodes.first_line: By My life! We have observed thee and Our glance hath ever been directed toward thee. Verily thy Lord is the All-Merciful, O Ali [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لعمری انا لاحظناک و کان طرفی الیک فی کل الاحیان ان ربک لهو الرحمن ای علی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @consolation and comfort, @presence of; reunion with God, @personal instructions, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
